title: spec_driven_triage_v1
description: spec_driven_v1 N0 Triage output — routing decision (small model alone, no deterministic rules). route=general only for queries defensible by domain reasoning without corpus evidence; if the query names/requires a specific clause, document, quantitative value, revision, or applicant claim, route=retrieval. When uncertain, retrieval.

rationale.description: 1-2 sentence rationale written *before* deciding the route (the query's language is fine): does defending this answer need corpus evidence, does the query name/require a specific regulatory item. Guided decoding decodes this field first, so the subsequent references_specifics and route are conditioned on it (leading CoT).

references_specifics.description: true if the query names, or *requires* in its answer, a specific clause, document, quantitative criterion value, revision, or applicant (design) claim. If true, route must be retrieval (when uncertain, true).

route.description: retrieval = corpus search pipeline (N1->N4). general = direct model-reasoning answer (N4-G). When uncertain, retrieval.
